## Type of Change

- [ ] New principle or output layer
- [ ] Modification to existing principle/layer

- [ ] Documentation improvement

## Testing

- [ ] Tested with at least one AI model

- [ ] Observable change in output confirmed

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] My changes follow the existing specification format
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have tested the specification end-to-end with my changes
